name: Close
one_line: Close is a sales CRM built around calling, email, SMS, and pipeline management.
self_serve_detail: Create an API key in Settings → Developer → API Keys in any Close account (paid; free trial available). No approval. OAuth 2.0 apps also registerable for user-facing integrations.

name: Zendesk
one_line: Zendesk is a customer support and helpdesk platform for ticketing and omnichannel service.
self_serve_detail: Admin generates API tokens in Admin Center → Apps and integrations → APIs → API tokens (token access must be enabled first). Free trial; no human approval. Multi-customer apps must register a global OAuth client.
api_surface: REST broad (Support, Talk, Chat, Guide, Help Center)

name: Freshdesk
one_line: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support/helpdesk platform with ticketing, omnichannel, and knowledge base.
self_serve_detail: API key found in user Profile Settings. API access is disabled on the free Sprout plan; a paid plan (Growth/Pro/Enterprise) or trial is required. No human approval.

name: Front
one_line: Front is a customer operations platform / shared inbox for collaborative support and messaging.
self_serve_detail: Company admin generates API tokens in settings, or creates an OAuth app (client ID/secret) in developer settings. Free trial; no human approval. Public integrations must use OAuth.

name: LiveAgent
one_line: LiveAgent is a multichannel help desk, live chat, and call center support software.
self_serve_detail: Admin generates an API key in Configuration → System → API (v3). 14-day free trial; no human approval. Built-in MCP access token generated in user profile.
